top_signals.title: Oil traders warn market is close to running on empty as Hormuz shuts again
top_signals.summary: Stockpiles that acted as shock absorbers early in Iran war are running low as key waterway closes once more
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Canadian wildfires prompt air quality warnings as far as New York City
top_signals.summary: Smoke from more than 100 ‘out of control’ blazes spread across region
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Trucking costs outpaced consumer inflation in ’25: ATRI
top_signals.summary:
ATRI’s annual cost study showed numbers that rose at a faster pace than consumer inflation.

The post Trucking costs outpaced consumer inflation in ’25: ATRI appeared first on FreightWaves.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Inflation expectations impacting rate path, bonds and global risk assets.

top_signals.title: Activities of U.S. Affiliates of Foreign Multinational Enterprises, 2024
top_signals.summary: Majority-owned U.S. affiliates of foreign multinational enterprises employed 8.57 million workers in the United States in 2024, a 0.2 percent increase from 8.56 million workers in 2023, according to statistics on U.S. affiliate operations and finances released today by the U.S. Bureau of Economic Analysis.
